requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Gabon is a Francophone IEC-aligned market and has no confirmed domestic EV connector standard that would override the IEC 62196 ecosystem for imported 4-wheel EVSE. For public or fleet charging, project specifications should be expected to reference IEC 62196-2 Type 2 for AC charging and IEC 62196-3 Combo 2 / CCS2 for DC fast charging where European or international vehicle compatibility is required. Connector conformity becomes mandatory when written into AGANOR, importer, site-owner, donor, fleet, or charge-point-operator specifications.
summary.zh: 加蓬属于法语区、IEC对接市场，未能确认其存在可取代IEC 62196体系的本土四轮EVSE接口标准。对于公共或车队充电，如需兼容欧洲或国际车型，项目规范预计会引用交流IEC 62196-2 Type 2和直流IEC 62196-3 Combo 2 / CCS2。当AGANOR、进口商、场地方、捐助方、车队或充电点运营商规范写明接口要求时，接口符合性即成为项目强制要求。
summary.zht: 加彭屬於法語區、IEC對接市場，未能確認其存在可取代IEC 62196體系的本土四輪EVSE接口標準。對於公共或車隊充電，如需兼容歐洲或國際車型，項目規範預計會引用交流IEC 62196-2 Type 2和直流IEC 62196-3 Combo 2 / CCS2。當AGANOR、進口商、場地方、捐助方、車隊或充電點運營商規範寫明接口要求時，接口符合性即成為項目強制要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories, Type 2
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers, Combo 2 / CCS2
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project or donor specifications for Gabon EVSE deployments

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and DC connectors are physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 and CCS2. China DC communication under GB/T 27930 uses a CAN-based stack and does not substitute for CCS2-related IEC 61851-24 or ISO 15118 communication where specified.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流接口与IEC 62196 Type 2和CCS2在物理及电气层面不兼容。中国直流通信GB/T 27930采用CAN总线体系，在要求CCS2相关IEC 61851-24或ISO 15118通信时不能替代。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流接口與IEC 62196 Type 2和CCS2在物理及電氣層面不兼容。中國直流通訊GB/T 27930採用CAN總線體系，在要求CCS2相關IEC 61851-24或ISO 15118通訊時不能替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board charger and BMS

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger needs hardware redesign before it can serve IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 vehicles in Gabon. Required changes include coupler and cable assembly, locking system, pilot signalling, DC communication stack, labels, spare parts, temperature-rise evidence, and IEC connector test reports. Adapters should not be treated as a compliance strategy for public, fleet, or donor-funded projects.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩必须完成硬件重新设计，才可服务加蓬IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2车辆。所需变更包括耦合器和电缆组件、锁止系统、导引信号、直流通信栈、标签、备件、温升证据和IEC接口测试报告。转接器不应被视为公共、车队或捐助方资助项目的合规方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁必須完成硬體重新設計，才可服務加彭IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2車輛。所需變更包括耦合器和電纜組件、鎖止系統、導引信號、直流通訊棧、標籤、備件、溫升證據和IEC接口測試報告。轉接器不應被視為公共、車隊或捐助方資助項目的合規方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by AGANOR review, importer, site owner, donor, fleet, CPO, or project specification; GB/T physical incompatibility prevents direct substitution
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion for Gabon is a hardware and communication redesign, not a paperwork change. Confirm Type 2 and CCS2 requirements in the project specification before quoting or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向加蓬的接口转换是硬件和通信重新设计，而非文件替换。报价或发货前，应确认项目规范中的Type 2和CCS2要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向加彭的接口轉換是硬體和通訊重新設計，而非文件替換。報價或發貨前，應確認項目規範中的Type 2和CCS2要求。
